query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') AS all_columns FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
